backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing audio post CRUD operations (add, edit, remove, get), user content management, and access control integration with authorization and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three completed header layout changes: moving the BrandingBannerDropdown next to the logo, repositioning the login button underneath the dropdown, and adding spacing between them.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of frontend components including routing, header with enlarged logo and stacked navigation, audio upload with 3-hour validation, player state management, and various UI components with premium styling.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI elements like background, foreground, primary, secondary, destructive, borders, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the SPEAKR application with viewport meta tag and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with all routes (feed, explore, upload, auth, onboarding, dashboard, legal pages), QueryClient, InternetIdentity, PlayerProvider, and onboarding redirect logic.
frontend/src/components/auth/InterestsCh: Checkbox group component for selecting user interests from a provided list, rendering in a two-column scrollable grid with controlled selection state.
frontend/src/components/categories/Categ: Category filter chips component displaying predefined categories as toggleable buttons with premium styling and shadow effects, integrated with feed filter state.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Empty state hero component for dashboard showing welcome message, upload CTA, and UI-only profile completion progress indicator with three steps (account, profile, first upload).
frontend/src/components/dashboard/MyCont: Displays a user's uploaded audio posts with edit, delete, and play functionality. Includes a dialog for editing post titles and descriptions, and integrates with the player to play audio items.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Statis: Shows user statistics including total uploads and total listens in a card layout with icons. Handles loading and error states for the statistics data.
frontend/src/components/feed/AudioCard.t: Renders an individual audio post card with play/pause, like/dislike, comments, and delete functionality. Supports both backend items and draft items, with delete permissions based on authorship.
frontend/src/components/feed/CommentsPan: Displays a list of comments for an audio post with author avatars and timestamps. Shows a placeholder message when no comments exist.
frontend/src/components/feed/FeedHeroBan: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/feed/ProceduralC: Renders either a custom thumbnail or a procedurally generated category-based cover image for audio items. Falls back to procedural covers when custom thumbnails are unavailable or placeholders.
frontend/src/components/language/Languag: Multi-select dropdown for choosing languages with search functionality and ability to add custom languages. Displays selected count and language labels with validation for custom entries.
frontend/src/components/layout/BrandingB: Displays the SPEAKR branding banner with a dropdown menu in the top-left corner. Falls back to text if the banner image fails to load.
Navigation dropdown menu with links to About, Categories, Contact, Help/FAQ, Terms of Service, and Privacy Policy pages. Triggered by a hamburger menu icon.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingB: Fixed floating button that navigates back to the feed page. Hidden when the mini-player is active.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingL: A floating button with popover that allows users to filter the feed by selecting multiple languages from a searchable list, with support for adding custom languages. Hides when the mini-player is active.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Main header component with centered logo, navigation menu dropdown, search bar, and authentication controls (login/logout/dashboard). Includes responsive layout and Internet Identity integration.
frontend/src/components/layout/PrimaryNa: Navigation bar component displaying Feed, Explore, and Upload links with icons, highlighting the active route.
frontend/src/components/onboarding/Onboa: Multi-step onboarding wizard with progress indicator that introduces users to discovering content, sharing audio, and using the mini-player. Features animated speaker icons and skip/complete callbacks.
frontend/src/components/player/MiniPlaye: Fixed bottom mini-player bar displaying current audio with thumbnail, playback controls, progress slider, and volume control. Provides play/pause, seek, and close functionality.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchBar: Search input component with icon that updates feed filters and auto-selects default language on focus or input change.
frontend/src/components/upload/AudioSour: Tabbed component allowing users to either upload audio files or record directly in the browser with MediaRecorder API, including recording time limits (3 hours), preview playback, and cleanup handling.
frontend/src/components/upload/CategoryP: A dropdown component for selecting or creating custom categories, using a Command palette UI with search and the ability to add new categories inline.
frontend/src/components/upload/UploadFor: Main upload form component that handles audio file uploads with metadata (title, description, category, languages), validates authentication and duration, and submits to the backend with progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/upload/useAudioD: Custom hook that validates audio files to ensure they don't exceed a 3-hour maximum duration by reading file metadata.
frontend/src/constants/categories.ts: Defines the available audio categories as a constant array including 'All', 'Entertainment', 'Technology', 'Food', 'Sports', 'Politics', 'Music', and 'Work'.
frontend/src/constants/categoryColors.ts: Maps category names to gradient color classes and badge variants for consistent theming across the application.
frontend/src/constants/interests.ts: Combines base categories with additional interests like 'Art & Design', 'Gaming', 'Health & Fitness', etc., to create a comprehensive interests list.
frontend/src/constants/languages.ts: Defines a comprehensive list of 184+ ISO 639-1 language codes with labels, including a 'none' option for music without language.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance, handling both authenticated and anonymous actors, with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomLanguages.ts: Hook for managing custom user-added languages stored in localStorage, with duplicate detection, alphabetical sorting, and integration with built-in language list.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMyContent.ts: Custom hook that fetches user's audio posts and provides mutations for editing and deleting posts, with automatic query invalidation on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts: Manages onboarding completion state in localStorage with functions to mark complete, check status, and reset.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query mutations for adding audio posts, listening to posts, and removing posts with toast notifications and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserStatistics.ts: Custom hook that fetches user statistics from the backend actor using React Query.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color palette inspired by SPEAKR branding, including light/dark themes, premium typography, glass effects, and card elevation utilities.
frontend/src/lib/draftFeedItems.ts: Manages draft audio items in localStorage, converting Files to data URLs for persistence and providing pub/sub notifications for draft changes.
frontend/src/lib/formatters.ts: Utility functions for formatting numbers with K/M/B suffixes and converting seconds to MM:SS duration format.
frontend/src/lib/proceduralCovers.ts: Generates deterministic SVG cover images based on category and seed using seeded random numbers, category-specific color schemes, and waveform patterns.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function that combines clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional CSS class merging.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/mock/mockAudio.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for audio items and comments, and exports an array of 6 mock audio items with sample data including titles, creators, categories, thumbnails, audio URLs, listen counts, languages, and comments.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders a simple About page with a heading and placeholder text indicating content is coming soon.
frontend/src/pages/AuthPage.tsx: Provides a tabbed authentication page with login and registration forms, including email/password inputs and an interests selection checkbox group for new users.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Renders a simple Contact page with a heading and placeholder text indicating contact channels are being set up.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Displays an authenticated user dashboard with statistics, content management, and an empty state hero; redirects unauthenticated users to the feed page.
frontend/src/pages/ExplorePage.tsx: Displays a grid of category cards with procedurally generated cover images that navigate to the feed page with the selected category filter applied.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Renders the main feed page with filterable audio cards, combining mock data, draft items, and backend content, with category chips and language-aware empty states.
frontend/src/pages/HelpPage.tsx: Renders a simple Help & FAQ page with a heading and placeholder text indicating the help center is being built.
frontend/src/pages/OnboardingPage.tsx: Displays an onboarding wizard component and handles completion or skip actions by marking onboarding complete and navigating to the feed page.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPage.tsx: Renders a simple Privacy Policy page with a heading and placeholder text indicating the policy is being finalized.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Renders a simple Terms of Service page with a heading and placeholder text indicating the terms are being prepared.
frontend/src/pages/UploadPage.tsx: Displays an upload page with a heading and description that renders the UploadForm component for audio file submission.
frontend/src/player/PlayerProvider.tsx: React context provider that manages audio playback state (play/pause, progress, volume) using an HTML5 Audio element and exposes controls via usePlayer hook.
frontend/src/state/feedFilters.ts: Zustand store with persistence for feed filtering state (search query, category, languages) that auto-selects browser default language on first load.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and cleanup methods.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system, extended shadows, Inter font family, and custom animations for accordions and speaker pulse effects.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting feature requests to enlarge speaker logo, update slogan to 'Giving Everyone A Voice!', and reorganize header layout with dropdown menu and login button.
